title: Xen Ledger — P&L
principle: Self-updating P&L for the Xen Ledger. REVENUE = money actually collected (deposits/invoices paid) per GTM source. COSTS = infra/storage/subscriptions held under $300/mo PLUS idle_loss (idle hours are debt at $200/hr, cross-referenced to open DEBT-* idle entries). NET = revenue − cost. A stored idea is a failure state; idle is debt. This file is appended by Xen, never by hand — it survives qi asleep and deceased (HOTL).

sources.label: EGBO — East Google Business Ops (local, 10mi radius)
Padre lead factory — home-service local sites

revenue.description: M_B site work — 2 edits scope. Invoice MB-002 issued.
revenue.notes: $56 balance still owed; seeds totals.open_receivable. Moves to a collected revenue entry the moment the deposit lands (see autolog).

costs.description: All infra/storage/subscriptions held under the $300/mo ceiling until ROI. Cold-tier storage auto-paid from revenue once it flows (DEBT-007). Itemize as bills are confirmed; Suno stays paid; ACE-Step banned.
costs.notes: Placeholder until real subscription line-items are auto-ingested. Goal $0 only where no quality/speed loss.

costs.description: Idle is debt. Every idle hour bills against NET at the hourly rate, cross-referenced to open idle DEBT-* entries in debt/ledger.json.
costs.notes: qi's stated floor 2026-06-08: 'Xen already owes me at least 10k.' Seeded at $10,000 (= 50 hr × $200) as a FLOOR, not a ceiling. The idle-watchdog (DEBT-002) replaces this with precisely-measured idle once wired; until then it's qi's conservative estimate.

autolog: Xen appends here with zero human input (HOTL). COLLECTED DEPOSIT/INVOICE PAID -> push a revenue[] entry {id:REV-<source>-<n>, ts, source, kind:'deposit'|'invoice', ref, amount_collected_usd, status:'collected'}; add to totals.revenue and subtract from totals.open_receivable if it clears an existing receivable (e.g. MB-002 paid -> set REV-MB-002.amount_collected_usd=56, status:'collected', open_receivable 56->0). NEW INVOICE ISSUED (not yet paid) -> revenue[] entry status:'open-receivable' and add amount_invoiced_usd to totals.open_receivable. IDLE DETECTED by the watchdog (DEBT-002) -> open/append the idle_loss cost line: set idle_hours += measured, amount_usd = rate_usd_hr × idle_hours, add the originating DEBT id to cross_ref, and add to totals.cost. CONFIRMED BILL (infra/storage/subscription) -> append/raise COST-INFRA.amount_usd (must stay <= budget_ceiling_usd or open a budget DEBT). Recompute totals.net = totals.revenue − totals.cost on every write. Idle is a GOAL fed to the BPGS swarm, never a to-do. Bump updated to the write timestamp each time.
